description: Run a one-year UrbanSim simulation for San Francisco using the orca framework in the notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/simulation.ipynb with the dataset /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5. The simulation must utilize the buildings and households tables and implement at least two orca steps. Export summary statistics for total households, total buildings, and mean residential price to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/simulation_summary.csv (including 'metric', 'before', and 'after' columns) and save a comparison bar chart to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/simulation_comparison.png.
